---
title: "WUP_08"
author: "Giovanni Asencio"
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

This project compares two regression models for predicting a bear's age.

# Load Data

```{r}
bears <- read.csv("BEARS.csv", header=TRUE)
```

# Model 1: AGE ~ LENGTH

```{r}
M1 <- lm(AGE ~ LENGTH, data=bears)

plot(AGE ~ LENGTH, data=bears)

abline(M1)

summary(M1)
```

The graph above shows the relationship between AGE and LENGTH.

# Model 2: AGE ~ NECK

```{r}
M2 <- lm(AGE ~ NECK, data=bears)

plot(AGE ~ NECK, data=bears)

abline(M2)

summary(M2)
```

The graph above shows the relationship between AGE and NECK.

# Comparison

The better model will be determined by comparing adjusted R-squared values.

# Conclusion

The model with the larger adjusted R-squared is the better predictor of AGE.
